use_cases: Displaying a loading state during data fetching or API calls
Indicating background processing or file generation
Showing users that content is being created or loaded
Providing visual feedback during async operations
Enhancing user experience during wait times in applications
ai_summary: A text-based loading animation component that displays 'Generating' with individual letter animations and a progress bar. The component uses CSS classes for styling and provides visual feedback during processing or generation states. It's a lightweight, atomic component designed for seamless integration into any application requiring loading indicators.
